chapters.title: Natural Selection
chapters.transcript: Darwinian evolution, fitness landscapes. Adaptation and speciation.

chapters.title: Population Genetics
chapters.transcript: Hardy-Weinberg equilibrium, genetic drift, migration, mutation, selection.

chapters.title: Phylogenetic Trees
chapters.transcript: Maximum parsimony, maximum likelihood, Bayesian inference. Bootstrapping.

chapters.title: Molecular Evolution
chapters.transcript: Substitution models (JC69, K80, GTR). dN/dS ratio. Positive selection.

chapters.title: Comparative Genomics
chapters.transcript: Synteny, orthologs vs paralogs. Genome evolution.
